headline: FOMC minutes at 2 PM ET are the sole gap-maker tonight — NDX sits near its gamma cushion line at ~29,000 with VXN/VIX at 1.53, flagging a tech-specific vol event ahead of Thursday's open.
NDX carries the week's highest overnight gap risk as Samsung-driven chip fears collide with Wednesday's FOMC minutes — tech-specific selloff, not broad risk-off.
NDX carries an Extreme vol signal with ~50% odds of a >3% weekly move — manage size until FOMC Minutes Wednesday clear the air.
3-day holiday gap with Iran funeral window and semiconductor weakness puts modest downside lean on all four indices — watch crude oil Sunday 6 PM ET for the real directional signal.
Q3 opens with a mild bullish futures lean, but NDX carries Extreme overnight gap risk — a ±1.1% implied swing — with NFP Thursday and July 4 closure amplifying the weekly stakes.
